queries.name: get_advisors
queries.purpose: All advisors for the advisor picker.
queries.outputs: advisors: vset rows {advisor_sid, advisor_name, rep_code, branch_cd, standard_id, data_source}

queries.name: get_months
queries.purpose: Months in scope, ordered, with prior_month_id, calendar_days, billable_days.
queries.outputs: months: vset rows {month_id, year, month_no, month_name, quarter, start_dt, end_dt, calendar_days, billable_days, prior_month_id, index_return, is_current, data_source}

queries.name: get_product_hierarchy
queries.purpose: class -> line -> group -> product with display order — the pivot row structure.
queries.outputs: classes, lines(+@parent_id=class_id), groups(+@parent_id=line_id), products(+@parent_id=group_id): vset rows

queries.name: get_driver_causes
queries.purpose: The driver-cause vocabulary — legend and filters.
queries.outputs: causes: vset rows {cause_id, cause_name, cause_description, default_data_source, display_order, data_source}

queries.name: get_monthly_revenue_by_product
queries.purpose: Monthly credited revenue by product group for the Trends pivot.
queries.outputs: monthly_revenue: vset rows {month_id, group_id, line_id, class_id, revenue, txn_count, account_count, avg_rate_bps, recurring_amt, one_time_amt, data_source}

queries.name: get_monthly_revenue_totals
queries.purpose: Per-month totals: revenue, recurring, non-recurring, txn count — the stacked bar chart.
queries.outputs: one object: revenue_by_month, recurring_by_month, non_recurring_by_month, txn_count_by_month (month_id -> value maps)

queries.name: get_revenue_changes
queries.purpose: Every revenue_change for the advisor in range, including the __TOTAL__ rows.
queries.outputs: changes: vset rows {change_id, advisor_sid, from_month_id, to_month_id, group_id, from_revenue, to_revenue, change_amt, change_pct, direction, data_source}

queries.name: get_change_drivers
queries.purpose: Drivers for one transition, ranked by |contribution|.
queries.outputs: drivers: vset rows {driver_id, change_id, cause_id, group_id, contribution_amt, contribution_pct, direction, rank, inputs_json, data_source}

queries.name: get_commentary
queries.purpose: Commentary rows for every transition in one version; version_id='' = latest PUBLISHED.
queries.outputs: commentaries: vset rows {commentary_id, version_id, advisor_sid, from_month_id, to_month_id, headline, narrative_text, bullets_json, status, blocked_reason, data_source} + resolved_version

queries.name: get_commentary_versions
queries.purpose: All commentary versions with status and counts, newest first.
queries.outputs: versions: vset rows {version_id, version_no, generated_at, model, prompt_version, data_snapshot_dt, status, advisor_count, transition_count, blocked_count, notes, data_source}

queries.name: get_product_revenue_change
queries.purpose: from/to revenue, change and txn count for one advisor + group + transition — the evidence modal's runnable reproduction query.

queries.name: get_evidence
queries.purpose: Full evidence record for one driver in one version; version_id='' = all versions for the driver.
queries.outputs: evidence: vset rows {evidence_id, driver_id, finding_text, calc_json, source_records_json, lineage_json, checks_json, gsql_query_name, gsql_params_json, gsql_result_json, source_sql, source_table, source_row_count, data_source}

queries.name: get_transactions
queries.purpose: Transaction rows for the drill-down; group_id='' = all groups.

queries.name: get_ingestion_counts
queries.purpose: Per V2 vertex type: count + data_source mix.
queries.outputs: one object: counts (type -> n), source_mix (type -> {data_source -> n})

queries.name: get_advisor_month_summary
queries.purpose: Per month: total revenue, txn count, distinct products, distinct accounts (from the transaction grain).
queries.outputs: one object: revenue_by_month, txn_count_by_month, products_by_month, accounts_by_month
